name: Landing Page
description: Marketing-focused layout for hero sections, feature blocks, and clear CTAs.

classes.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-extrabold mb-6 text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100 leading-tight tracking-tight
classes.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold mb-5 mt-12 text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100 leading-tight
classes.h3: text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-8 text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-200
classes.h4: text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-6 text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-200
classes.h5: text-lg font-semibold mb-2 text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300 uppercase tracking-wide
classes.h6: text-sm font-semibold mb-2 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest
classes.a: inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-indigo-700 dark:text-indigo-400 hover:text-indigo-900 dark:hover:text-indigo-300 font-semibold underline decoration-2 underline-offset-4 transition-colors
classes.img: max-w-full my-8 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 shadow-xl
classes.table: table-auto my-8 w-full text-left overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700
classes.ul: list-disc list-inside mb-6 space-y-2 marker:text-emerald-600 dark:marker:text-emerald-400
classes.th: p-4 text-sm uppercase tracking-wide font-semibold text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800
classes.blockquote: my-8 border-l-4 border-indigo-500 dark:border-indigo-400 bg-indigo-50 dark:bg-indigo-900/20 text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300 italic p-6 rounded-r-xl text-xl leading-relaxed
classes.code: bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 text-indigo-700 dark:text-indigo-300 px-2 py-1 rounded-md font-mono text-sm
classes.pre: bg-slate-900 text-slate-100 p-6 rounded-2xl overflow-x-auto border border-slate-700 shadow-lg
classes.body: bg-gradient-to-b from-white via-slate-50 to-white dark:from-slate-950 dark:via-slate-900 dark:to-slate-950 p-8 md:p-12
